findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "list_exchanges" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Returns directory of all 28 exchanges supported by Headless Oracle: MIC codes, exchange names, IANA timezones, market hours metadata, and mic_type (iso|conventi…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
